item.question: I signed up for the monthly medical question bank plan yesterday, but I meant to choose the annual plan. Can you help me change my subscription without losing access to my saved work or billing history?
item.answer: Absolutely — we can help switch your plan from monthly to annual. In most cases, your saved work, bookmarks, and account history will remain intact because the change only affects the billing plan, not your account itself. If your current monthly plan is still active, the change may take effect immediately or at the end of the current billing cycle depending on your subscription settings. If you were charged for the monthly plan already, any prorated credit or adjustment will be handled according to the payment platform’s policy. To proceed, please review your subscription settings in your account and confirm the plan change. If you run into any issues, contact support with the last 4 digits of the payment method and the date of the most recent charge so we can look it up securely.

Can you tell me if I’ll be charged right away, whether my current access changes immediately, and how to update the invoice details without exposing my personal information?

Use a company billing email only if you’re authorized to receive invoices there. Avoid entering sensitive personal information in free-text fields. item.question: Hi, I’m trying to submit an invoice for a training workshop we purchased for our clinic, but the accounting team says the document is missing the institution details they need. Can you help me figure out what information should be on the invoice and how to request a corrected copy without including any patient information?
item.answer: Yes. Do not include any patient names, chart numbers, or clinical details. If the invoice is tied to a specific order, provide only the order number and the institution billing contact information. If you want, I can also help draft a concise request message for a corrected invoice.

item.question: I’m trying to use the medical question bank platform in Chrome on my laptop, but the quiz page keeps freezing after I log in. The page loads, then the buttons stop responding and I get a blank white area where the questions should be. I’ve refreshed a few times and it still happens. Is there something I can do on my end?
item.answer: Yes — this is often caused by a browser cache issue, an extension conflict, or a browser setting that blocks part of the page from loading correctly. Please try the following steps in order: 1) Hard refresh the page. 2) Open the site in an incognito/private window to see if an extension is interfering. 3) Clear the browser cache and cookies for the platform. 4) Make sure your browser is fully updated. 5) Disable ad blockers, script blockers, or privacy extensions temporarily and reload the page. 6) If possible, try a different browser or another device to confirm whether the issue is browser-specific. If the problem continues, send support the browser name/version, device type, and a screenshot of the blank area so we can investigate further.
item.equipment_problem: Web-based medical question bank quiz page freezes and shows blank content in a desktop browser after login.
steps: Hard refresh the quiz page and sign in again.
Open the platform in an incognito/private window and test whether the page loads normally.
Clear cache and cookies for the site, then restart the browser.
Update the browser and temporarily disable extensions such as ad blockers or script blockers.
If the issue persists, test in a different browser or device and contact support with browser details and a screenshot.
item.safety_info: Do not enter any patient-identifiable information while troubleshooting. If the platform is being used in a clinical or training setting, stop and retry only after confirming the page is stable to avoid losing progress or misclicking due to the freeze.
tips: If the blank area only appears after login, the problem is often related to cached site data or an extension.
Incognito mode is a quick way to check whether the issue is caused by browser add-ons.
Take note of the exact time and any error messages before clearing data, in case support needs them.
